# Get Ad Creative Rejection Reasons

**Web Service Endpoint**

Fetches ad creative rejection reasons by custom product page ID.

## Discussion

Use this endpoint to fetch rejected ad creative approval reason details. Use the `id` that returns in `ProductPageReason` in the resource path as your `productPageReasonId`. See the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ProductPageReason] object for rejection reason code enumerations, parameter descriptions, and selector condition operators.

### Payload example: Get rejection reasons



## Ad Rejections

- **Find Ad Creative Rejection Reasons**: Fetches ad creative rejection reasons.
- **Find App Assets**: Fetches app asset metadata by adam ID.

items.description: Fetches app asset metadata by adam ID.
